name: GymX
description: A robust gym membership, attendance, and facility administration system designed to track subscriptions, inventory sales, and control physical access gates via dynamic QR codes.
features: IoT-integrated QR Code access control system linked with physical gym gates.
Automated access restriction upon subscription expiration.
Comprehensive Gym Membership & Attendance tracking logs.
Product inventory tracking for supplement sales and staff permissions.
my_role: Backend-to-Mobile Engineer - Solved physical access security challenges by developing a real-time QR code authentication system integrated with the gym's hardware gates. The system validates subscription status in real-time and dynamically controls gate access, preventing unauthorized entry once subscriptions expire.
